chapter_title.ar: باب  فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ شُهَدَاءُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَى خَلْقِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 9 – Regarding that the Imams<sup>asws</sup> are the witnesses of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic upon His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/337)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/337)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَكَيْفَ إِذا جِئْنا مِنْ كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ بِشَهِيدٍ وَ جِئْنا بِكَ عَلى هؤُلاءِ شَهِيداً قَالَ نَزَلَتْ فِي أُمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) خَاصَّةً فِي كُلِّ قَرْنٍ مِنْهُمْ إِمَامٌ مِنَّا شَاهِدٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ مُحَمَّدٌ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) شَاهِدٌ عَلَيْنَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed Al Qandy, from Sama’at who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws said regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [4:41] How will it be, then, when We Bring from every community a witness and bring you as a witness against them? heasws said: ‘It was Revealed regarding the community of Muhammadsaww in particular. In every generation from them there is an Imamasws from us, a witness upon them, and Muhammadsaww is a witness upon usasws’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ya‘qub ibn Yazid from Ziyad al-Qandi from Suma‘a who has said that Imam abu ‘Abdallah has said the following about the words of Allah in the Holu Quran. “How will it be when We call for a witness from every nation and have you, (Muhammad), testify against them all?” [4:41] The Imam (a.s.) said that this verse is was revealed about the followers of Prophet Muhammad (s.a.) in particular. In every generation of these people there will an Imam from our family who would bear witness over their activities and Prophet Muahammad himself will bear witness over us.”
